commits: 6b70555: docs(0.5.2): design memo for computed model_info capability injection
24f6e73: feat(0.5.2): compute and inject per-model capability into model_info

blockers_encountered.description: Two pre-existing proxy tests (test_prepare_runtime_config_returns_original_when_no_overrides, test_prepare_runtime_config_keeps_mcp_servers_in_lazy_mode) assumed _VALID_CONFIG (which has a model_list) yields no temp config when no env overrides fire. The brief's unconditional model_info injection now always sets changed=True, which is the documented expected behavior.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Adapted both in-scope tests in tests/test_proxy.py: the no-override test now uses a model_list-free config to exercise the genuine no-change path; the lazy-mode test now asserts a temp config is written and mcp_servers are preserved within it.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Adapted two existing runtime-config tests in tests/test_proxy.py to the now-unconditional model_info injection (anchor drift in expected behavior; both tests are in my MODIFY list).
